title: Without fast path, TiDB will return wrong row with plan cache
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
create table t (a int, b int);
insert t values (1, 7), (1, 8), (1, 9);
prepare stmt from 'select * from t where _tidb_rowid = ?';
set @a=2;
execute stmt using @a;
set @a=1;
execute stmt using @a;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```
1 8
1 7
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
1 8
1 8
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
poc: create table t (a int, b int);
prepare stmt from 'select * from t where _tidb_rowid = ?';
key_bug_features: Plan cache returns wrong row without fast path
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id = ?';
